content.problemStatement:
You are given a permutation PPP of NNN integers from 111 to NNN.

The weight of a subarray [L,R][L, R][L,R] (1ŌēżLŌēżRŌēżN)(1\le L \le R \le N)(1ŌēżLŌēżRŌēżN) is defined as ŌłŻiŌłÆjŌłŻ|i - j|ŌłŻiŌłÆjŌłŻ where iii denotes the index of the **maximum** element and jjj denotes the index of the **minimum** element in the subarray [L,R][L,R][L,R].

Find the **sum** of the weights of **all** subarrays of the given permutation.

Note that, ŌłŻXŌłŻ|X|ŌłŻXŌłŻ denotes the absolute value of a number XXX. For example, ŌłŻŌłÆ4ŌłŻ=4|-4| = 4ŌłŻŌłÆ4ŌłŻ=4 and ŌłŻ7ŌłŻ=7|7| = 7ŌłŻ7ŌłŻ=7.


Input Format

The first line contains an integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The TTT test cases then follow:
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN, denoting the length of the permutation.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers P1,P2,ŌĆ”,PNP_1,P_2,\ldots,P_NP1ŌĆŗ,P2ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,PNŌĆŗ, denoting the elements of the permutation.


Output Format
For each test case, output the **sum** of the weights of all subarrays of the given permutation.
constraints: 1ŌēżPiŌēżN1 \leq P_i \leq N1ŌēżPiŌĆŗŌēżN and PiŌēĀPjP_i \neq P_jPiŌĆŗŅĆĀ=PjŌĆŗ for iŌēĀji \neq jiŅĆĀ=j
Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5Ōŗģ1055\cdot 10^55Ōŗģ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111:

The weights of the subarrays [1,1],[2,2],[3,3][1,1],[2,2],[3,3][1,1],[2,2],[3,3] are 000 as i=ji=ji=j in all these subarrays.
Subarray [L,R]=[1,2][L,R] = [1,2][L,R]=[1,2] has weight 111 as i=1i=1i=1 and j=2j=2j=2: ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ2ŌłŻ=1|1 - 2| =1ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ2ŌłŻ=1.
Subarray [L,R]=[2,3][L,R] = [2,3][L,R]=[2,3] has weight 111 as i=2i=2i=2 and j=3j=3j=3: ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ3ŌłŻ=1|2 - 3| =1ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ3ŌłŻ=1.
Subarray [L,R]=[1,3][L,R] = [1,3][L,R]=[1,3] has weight 222 as i=1i=1i=1 and j=3j=3j=3: ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ3ŌłŻ=2|1 - 3| =2ŌłŻ1ŌłÆ3ŌłŻ=2.

Sum of weights is 1+1+2=41+1+2=41+1+2=4.
Test case 222:

The weights of the subarrays [1,1],[2,2],[3,3],[4,4][1,1],[2,2],[3,3],[4,4][1,1],[2,2],[3,3],[4,4] are 000 as i=ji = ji=j in all these subarrays.
Subarray [L,R]=[1,2][L,R] = [1,2][L,R]=[1,2] has weight 111 as i=2i=2i=2 and j=1j=1j=1: ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ1ŌłŻ=1|2 - 1| =1ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ1ŌłŻ=1.
Subarray [L,R]=[2,3][L,R] = [2,3][L,R]=[2,3] has weight 111 as i=2i=2i=2 and j=3j=3j=3: ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ3ŌłŻ=1|2 - 3| =1ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ3ŌłŻ=1.
Subarray [L,R]=[3,4][L,R] = [3,4][L,R]=[3,4] has weight 111 as i=3i=3i=3 and j=4j=4j=4: ŌłŻ3ŌłÆ4ŌłŻ=1|3 - 4| =1ŌłŻ3ŌłÆ4ŌłŻ=1.
Subarray [L,R]=[1,3][L,R] = [1,3][L,R]=[1,3] has weight 111 as i=2i=2i=2 and j=1j=1j=1: ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ1ŌłŻ=1|2 - 1| =1ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ1ŌłŻ=1.
Subarray [L,R]=[2,4][L,R] = [2,4][L,R]=[2,4] has weight 222 as i=2i=2i=2 and j=4j=4j=4: ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ4ŌłŻ=2|2 - 4| =2ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ4ŌłŻ=2.
Subarray [L,R]=[1,4][L,R] = [1,4][L,R]=[1,4] has weight 111 as i=2i=2i=2 and j=1j=1j=1: ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ1ŌłŻ=1|2 - 1| =1ŌłŻ2ŌłÆ1ŌłŻ=1.

Sum of weights is 1+1+1+1+2+1=71+1+1+1+2+1=71+1+1+1+2+1=7.
